title: Faithfull Tools FAIESSHPK Essentials Hand Patio Knife, Blue, 7 x 29 x 3 cm
features: Removes weeds and moss from in-between patio and paving slabs
Made from heat treated (hardened) carbon steel
Tubular steel handle with a polypropylene coating
description: From the manufacturer The Essential Range By Faithfull Tools A range of the most frequently used garden hand tools, aimed at the homeowner, designed for quality and frequent use. These tools are made from tubular steel, with additional soft to the touch grips on all handles. These products are ideal for everyday use in the garden, the range features hand tools, forks, spades and rakes. Powder coated carbon steel Durable plastic handles Manufacture and Materials All products in the Essential Range are manufactured to the highest standards. Carbon Steel The head of each product is manufactured from carbon steel with a powder coated finish. Handles Each product is fitted with a durable plastic handle. The forks and spades in this range have a 'D' grip and are angled to reduce back strain. Product Range The Faithfull Essential Range contains small hand tools, forks and spades and longer handled tools such as rakes and hoes.
